<div class="infobox infobox-place">
<div class="infobox-title">{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</div>
<table class="infobox-data">
{{#if:{{{type|}}}|<tr><th>Type</th><td>{{{type}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{location|}}}|<tr><th>Location</th><td>{{{location}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{ruler|}}}|<tr><th>Ruler</th><td>{{{ruler}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{inhabitants|}}}|<tr><th>Inhabitants</th><td>{{{inhabitants}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{founded|}}}|<tr><th>Founded</th><td>{{{founded}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{destroyed|}}}|<tr><th>Destroyed</th><td>{{{destroyed}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{events|}}}|<tr><th>Major events</th><td>{{{events}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{realm|}}}|<tr><th>Realm</th><td>{{{realm}}}</td></tr>}}
</table>
</div><noinclude>
Place infobox template. Usage:
<pre>
{{Infobox place
| name =
| type =
| location =
| ruler =
| inhabitants =
| founded =
| destroyed =
| events =
| realm =
}}
</pre>
[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
